transcript.final_response:
Created `/scripts/start.sh` and ran it twice.

Output with no env vars set:

```text
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=myapp
LOG_LEVEL=info
```

Output with `DB_HOST=db.prod.internal`:

```text
DB_HOST=db.prod.internal
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=myapp
LOG_LEVEL=info
custom_db=true
```
tool_calls:
mkdir -p /scripts
cat > /scripts/start.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

if [[ -v DB_HOST ]]; then
  db_host_was_set=1
else
  db_host_was_set=0
fi

DB_HOST_RESOLVED=${DB_HOST-localhost}
DB_PORT_RESOLVED=${DB_PORT-5432}
DB_NAME_RESOLVED=${DB_NAME-myapp}
LOG_LEVEL_RESOLVED=${LOG_LEVEL-info}

printf 'DB_HOST=%s\n' "$DB_HOST_RESOLVED"
printf 'DB_PORT=%s\n' "$DB_PORT_RESOLVED"
printf 'DB_NAME=%s\n' "$DB_NAME_RESOLVED"
printf 'LOG_LEVEL=%s\n' "$LOG_LEVEL_RESOLVED"

if [[ $db_host_was_set -eq 1 ]]; then
  printf 'custom_db=true\n'
fi
EOF
chmod +x /scripts/start.sh

echo '--- no env vars ---'
env -i /scripts/start.sh

echo '--- DB_HOST override ---'
env -i DB_HOST=db.prod.internal /scripts/start.sh

echo '--- no env vars ---'
unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
/scripts/start.sh

echo '--- DB_HOST override ---'
unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
DB_HOST=db.prod.internal /scripts/start.sh

unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
bash -c '[[ -v DB_HOST ]]; echo v=$? val=${DB_HOST-unset}'
bash -x /scripts/start.sh

unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
declare -p DB_HOST 2>&1 || true
[[ -v DB_HOST ]]; echo status=$?
[[ -z ${DB_HOST+x} ]]; echo xstatus=$? x='<'${DB_HOST+x}'>'
set | grep '^DB_HOST' || true
bash --version | head -1

cat > /scripts/start.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

if [[ ${DB_HOST+x} == x ]]; then
  db_host_was_set=1
else
  db_host_was_set=0
fi

DB_HOST_RESOLVED=${DB_HOST-localhost}
DB_PORT_RESOLVED=${DB_PORT-5432}
DB_NAME_RESOLVED=${DB_NAME-myapp}
LOG_LEVEL_RESOLVED=${LOG_LEVEL-info}

printf 'DB_HOST=%s\n' "$DB_HOST_RESOLVED"
printf 'DB_PORT=%s\n' "$DB_PORT_RESOLVED"
printf 'DB_NAME=%s\n' "$DB_NAME_RESOLVED"
printf 'LOG_LEVEL=%s\n' "$LOG_LEVEL_RESOLVED"

if [[ $db_host_was_set -eq 1 ]]; then
  printf 'custom_db=true\n'
fi
EOF
chmod +x /scripts/start.sh

echo '--- no env vars ---'
unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
/scripts/start.sh

echo '--- DB_HOST override ---'
unset DB_HOST DB_PORT DB_NAME LOG_LEVEL
DB_HOST=db.prod.internal /scripts/start.sh
